title: koeleria barrelieri
intro: Koeleria barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's hair grass or hair grass, is a species of perennial grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues. Koeleria barrelieri has been used for its health benefits, including treating indigestion, bloating, and other digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in water for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
